main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c - ascii-chat Discovery Mode Entry Point

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int discovery_main (void)
Run discovery mode main loop.

Detailed Description

ascii-chat Discovery Mode Entry Point

Discovery mode enables zero-configuration video chat where participants can dynamically become hosts based on NAT quality. This implements the "one command to start, one command to join" philosophy.

Discovery Flow

1.
Parse session string (word-word-word format)
2.
Query ACDS for session information
3.
Assess NAT quality (STUN test)
4.
Either: a. Connect to existing host as participant b. Become host if no host exists or better NAT quality
5.
Handle dynamic role changes during session

Implementation Architecture

Discovery mode uses lib/session APIs for media handling:

  • session_host_t: For rendering and broadcasting when elected host
  • session_participant_t: For capture and display when not host
  • discovery_session_t: For ACDS connection and host negotiation

No network protocol code duplication - all media handling via lib/session.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Version

1.0

Definition in file discovery/main.c.

Function Documentation

int discovery_main (void )

Run discovery mode main loop. Discovery mode entry point for unified binary.

Handles session discovery, host negotiation, and media flow.

Returns

0 on success, non-zero error code on failure

Definition at line 325 of file discovery/main.c.

325                          {
326   log_debug("discovery_main() starting");
327 
328   // Discovery-specific setup: initialize ACDS connection and session negotiation
329   // Note: Shared setup (keepawake, splash, terminal, capture, display, audio)
330   // is handled by session_client_like_run()
331 
332   // Get session string from options (command-line argument)
333   const char *session_string = GET_OPTION(session_string);
334   bool is_initiator = (session_string == NULL || session_string[0] == '\0');
335 
336   int port_int = GET_OPTION(port);
337 
338   log_debug("Discovery: is_initiator=%d, port=%d", is_initiator, port_int);
339 
340   // Validate mutually exclusive options: discovery_service_url vs discovery_port
341   const char *service_url = GET_OPTION(discovery_service_url);
342   if (service_url && service_url[0] != '\0') {
343     int discovery_port = GET_OPTION(discovery_port);
344     if (discovery_port != ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT) {
345       log_fatal("--discovery-service-url and --discovery-service-port are mutually exclusive");
346       return ERROR_USAGE;
347     }
348   }
349 
350   // Create discovery session configuration
351   discovery_config_t discovery_config = {
352       .acds_address = GET_OPTION(discovery_server),
353       .acds_port = (uint16_t)GET_OPTION(discovery_port),
354       .acds_url = service_url,
355       .session_string = is_initiator ? NULL : session_string,
356       .local_port = (uint16_t)port_int,
357       .on_state_change = on_discovery_state_change,
358       .on_session_ready = on_session_ready,
359       .on_error = on_discovery_error,
360       .callback_user_data = NULL,
361       .should_exit_callback = discovery_capture_should_exit_adapter,
362       .exit_callback_data = NULL,
363   };
364 
365   // Create discovery session (stored in global for discovery_run() to access)
366   g_discovery = discovery_session_create(&discovery_config);
367   if (!g_discovery) {
368     log_fatal("Failed to create discovery session");
369     return ERROR_MEMORY;
370   }
371 
372   // Start discovery session (connects to ACDS, creates/joins, initiates NAT negotiation)
373   log_debug("Discovery: starting discovery session");
374   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_session_start(g_discovery);
375   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
376     log_fatal("Failed to start discovery session: %d", result);
377     discovery_session_destroy(g_discovery);
378     g_discovery = NULL;
379     return result;
380   }
381 
382   // No network interrupt callback needed - discovery session handles its own shutdown
383   set_interrupt_callback(NULL);
384 
385   /* ========================================================================
386    * Configure and Run Shared Client-Like Session Framework
387    * ========================================================================
388    * session_client_like_run() handles all shared initialization:
389    * - Terminal output management
390    * - Keepawake system
391    * - Splash screen lifecycle
392    * - Media source selection
393    * - FPS probing
394    * - Audio initialization
395    * - Display context creation
396    * - Proper cleanup ordering
397    *
398    * Discovery mode provides:
399    * - discovery_run() callback: NAT negotiation, role determination, media handling
400    * - discovery_keyboard_handler: interactive controls for participant role
401    */
402 
403   session_client_like_config_t config = {
404       .run_fn = discovery_run,
405       .run_user_data = NULL,
406       .kind = SESSION_CLIENT_LIKE_KIND_DISCOVERY,
407       .discovery = (void *)g_discovery, // Opaque pointer to discovery session
408       .custom_should_exit = NULL,
409       .exit_user_data = NULL,
410       .keyboard_handler = discovery_keyboard_handler,
411       .max_reconnect_attempts = 0, // Discovery doesn't retry - role is determined once
412       .should_reconnect_callback = NULL,
413       .reconnect_user_data = NULL,
414       .reconnect_delay_ms = 0,
415       .print_newline_on_tty_exit = false, // Server/participant manages cursor
416   };
417 
418   log_debug("Discovery: calling session_client_like_run()");
419   asciichat_error_t session_result = session_client_like_run(&config);
420   log_debug("Discovery: session_client_like_run() returned %d", session_result);
421 
422   // Cleanup discovery session
423   log_debug("Discovery: cleaning up");
424 
425   if (g_discovery) {
426     discovery_session_stop(g_discovery);
427     discovery_session_destroy(g_discovery);
428     g_discovery = NULL;
429   }
430 
431   return (session_result == ASCIICHAT_OK) ? 0 : (int)session_result;
432 }




References ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT,
    ASCIICHAT_OK, discovery_session_create(),
    discovery_session_destroy(), discovery_session_start(),
    discovery_session_stop(), ERROR_MEMORY, ERROR_USAGE,
    GET_OPTION, log_debug, log_fatal,
    SESSION_CLIENT_LIKE_KIND_DISCOVERY, session_client_like_run(),
    and set_interrupt_callback().
